summary: Dominion OS is controlled-preview demo ready. The public /demo-1 bridge is safe for prospect sharing, the Cloud Run runtime routes are live, health/status receipts are current, and the public MP4 proof recording is verified. Full commercial launch remains blocked until commerce or invoice-only procurement, customer onboarding, production observability, rollback, incident-response, and any autonomous-operation claims have separate receipts.

currentEvidence: Cloud Run /demo returned 200 text/html during operator verification.
Cloud Run /health, /status, and /demo/status returned 200 application/json during operator verification.
The web MP4 and master MP4 returned 200 video/mp4 and are served as public runtime media.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Keep runtime, health/status, and MP4 receipts current before high-stakes demos.

currentEvidence: Live https://www.fractal5solutions.com/demo-1 exposes the current public proof bridge and controlled-access path.
Visual inspection found the bridge safe and aligned, but with a large empty Squarespace first-fold gap before the proof hero.
squarespace/demo-1-visual-runtime-polish-patch.html provides a page-scoped fix for the blank first-fold gap.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Apply the visual polish patch to the live Squarespace /demo-1 page or replace the code block with an updated one-shot source.

currentEvidence: demo/assets/demo-manifest.json is public and source-served.
demo/assets/sample-data.json asserts no production data, customer data, secrets, or payment data.
demo/assets/demo-download-package.json includes the public runtime route, verified web MP4, sample data, and release receipts.
demo/assets/release-receipts.json preserves claim-control boundaries.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Keep source-served assets public, public-safe, and receipt-gated; do not add private assets.

currentEvidence: Public demo assets assert no secrets, customer data, payment data, or private services exposed.
Runtime responses include security headers including CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, and Permissions-Policy.
Complete commercial-production security and tenant-isolation receipts remain separate gates.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Secret scanning, dependency scanning, tenant-isolation proof, public-boundary review, and release-security receipts exist for the public and production paths.

currentEvidence: Cloud Run /health and /status are public runtime receipt surfaces.
The runtime emits environment, region, release repo, revision, timestamp, and generatedAt metadata.
Default status checks remain lightweight and do not require remote probes.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Use operator-triggered route probes before important demos; avoid background probes by default under Minimum Spend Mode.

currentEvidence: No public proof of self-serve checkout, customer portal, subscription billing, tenant provisioning, support, refund, or privacy receipts is allowed to be inferred from the bridge.
Controlled-preview commercial use is allowed only as a governed or invoice-only scoped access path with no payment data exposed on the public bridge.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Live checkout/customer portal or deliberately invoice-only sales motion is documented with payment/procurement, onboarding, entitlement, support, refund, and privacy receipts.

currentEvidence: Health and status endpoints exist and are public.
No durable public proof of uptime checks, alert routing, SLOs, incident receipts, traces, metrics retention, or rollback evidence is present as a full commercial receipt.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Uptime, alerting, log-sampling, SLO, incident-response, and rollback receipts are generated and stored without exposing secrets.

currentEvidence: Native GCP self-healing remains explicitly unclaimed without separate proof.
Autonomous operations claims require watcher ingestion, remediation, and rollback/recovery receipts before they can move green.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Watcher ingestion, autonomous remediation, rollback/recovery, native or equivalent self-healing, and auditable receipts exist and are current.

allowedNow: Dominion OS has a live public Google Cloud demo surface with public demo, health, status, demo-status, and MP4 routes.
Dominion OS has a canonical Fractal5 /demo-1 public website bridge for controlled prospect sharing.
Dominion OS has source-served public demo assets, sample data, release receipts, watchlist verification scaffolding, and a commercial proof receipt index.
The public bridge is controlled-preview safe; full commercial launch remains receipt-gated.

requiredReceiptsForFullCommercialGreen: operator-triggered probe output for /demo-1, Cloud Run routes, and raw assets before high-stakes demos
autonomous remediation/self-healing receipt if that claim is made
